debt_why.label: TANGEDCO accumulated losses absorption
debt_why.notes: State absorbed TANGEDCO losses as UDAY grants. Per unit supply cost gap vs revenue: Rs 0.89/kWh vs state average Rs 0.47/kWh. TN White Paper (2021) called for full restructuring.

debt_why.label: TN share of central taxes: 7.9% → 4.023% (14th FC)
debt_why.notes: 14th Finance Commission reduced TN's share of divisible pool from 4.969% to 4.023%. Loss compounded over 5 years (2015-20), forcing state to borrow to maintain expenditure.

debt_why.label: COVID-19 relief and health expenditure
debt_why.notes: Emergency health and welfare spending during pandemic; no central compensation for full amount.

debt_why.label: Chennai Metro Rail Phase-II — state share
debt_why.notes: CMRL Phase II approved at total project cost of ~Rs 63,246 crore. State provides equity and guarantees. Loan component from JICA and central govt.

debt_why.label: TANGEDCO ongoing grants
debt_why.notes: Annual grants to bridge TANGEDCO revenue gap. Cumulative grants 2019-26 estimated at Rs 83,156 crore.

debt_why.label: Revenue deficit borrowing (1.7% of GSDP)
debt_why.notes: State borrows to cover revenue expenditure that exceeds revenue receipts — structurally driven by committed expenditure growth.

debt_why.label: Roads and bridges capital outlay spike
debt_why.notes: Rs 18,456 crore allocated for capital outlay on roads in 2025-26 BE — part of multi-year highway programme.

debt_why.label: Energy capital outlay — 3,973% increase
debt_why.notes: Energy sector capital outlay jumped from Rs 124 crore (RE 2024-25) to Rs 5,068 crore (BE 2025-26) — a 3,973% increase. Represents state investment in power corporation infrastructure.

debt_why.label: TN share of central taxes: 4.079% (15th FC) vs historical 7.9%
debt_why.notes: Cumulative loss estimated at over Rs 3 lakh crore (2015-2025). TN's share declined through 13th FC (4.969%), 14th FC (4.023%), 15th FC (4.079%). At original 7.9% share, TN would have received ~Rs 3 lakh crore more in central transfers.

debt_why.label: TANGEDCO cumulative grants 2019-2025
debt_why.notes: Total TANGEDCO grants from state between 2019-20 and 2025-26 estimated at Rs 83,156 crore.

debt_why.label: Salaries + pension + interest = 62% of revenue receipts
debt_why.notes: Committed expenditure (Rs 2,07,054 crore) consumes 62% of estimated revenue receipts (Rs 3,31,569 crore). Salaries: 28%, Pension: 14%, Interest: 21%. This structural rigidity limits capital investment flexibility.

debt_why.label: Outstanding debt projected at Rs 10.71 lakh crore by 2026-27
debt_why.notes: Outstanding liabilities projected to reach Rs 10.71 lakh crore (26.12% of GSDP) in 2026-27 as per TN Interim Budget. Remains within FRBM ceiling. Net borrowings for 2025-26: Rs 1,05,000 crore.
